posts.text: America’s welfare state is more European than you think. Even big states like California and New York offer citizens a European-style bargain of higher taxes and generous welfare: http://econ.st/4kZutMD

posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump says the UK is “finally giving serious thought to sending two aircraft carriers to the Middle East.”

“We don’t need them any longer… we don’t need people that join wars after we’ve already won,” Trump says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
